basic_details.job_title: Bank of Baroda Chief Technology Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Baroda Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website https://www.bankofbaroda.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Bank of Baroda Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 40 years Maximum Age: 57 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PWD: Gen/EWS-10, OBC-13, SC/ST-15, Ex-servicemen: Gen/EWS-5, OBC-8, SC/ST-10

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering Graduate in Computer Science/ Information Systems / other related fields or MCA or equivalent qualification
qualification.details: Engineering Graduate in Computer Science/ Information Systems / other related fields or MCA or equivalent qualification.

selection_process: Application Scrutiny Psychometric Test Interview Compensation Negotiation
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Bank of Baroda to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bank of Baroda Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Bank of Baroda Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Bank of Baroda Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Bank of Baroda to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bank of Baroda Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bank of Baroda CTO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 23rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the CTO post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 40 years, and the maximum age limit is 57 years for the Chief Technology Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the CTO role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Engineering Graduates in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related fields, or possess an MCA or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Chief Technology Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Application Scrutiny, a Psychometric Test, an Interview, and Compensation Negotiation.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the CTO position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Chief Technology Officer (CTO) in Bank of Baroda.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/13.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the job location as Mumbai, Maharashtra. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply, but they should be prepared to relocate if selected.
